name: Stable Diffusion (DreamStudio)
data_egress_concerns: Text prompts may contain confidential product descriptions or internal terminology
Reference images uploaded for img2img may contain proprietary designs or PII
Negative prompts could reveal internal brand or compliance language
Generated images may inadvertently replicate copyrighted or trademarked visual elements
training_use_default: Free-tier generated images and prompts may be used for service improvement. Enterprise API customers can negotiate data exclusion via custom agreements. Review current Stability AI terms for opt-out mechanics.
